question: How much earlier do I wake up on Fridays compared to other weekdays?

retrieval_results.context:
Wakes up at 6:00 AM on Fridays.
User wakes up at 6:30 AM on weekdays.
Does a 45-minute workout starting at 6:10 AM each Friday.
Mediates for 30 minutes starting at 7:15 AM each Friday.
User gets ready for work at 8:00 AM each weekday
User grabs coffee and catches up on news for 25 minutes starting at 8:35 AM each Friday.
